# CWE-266 — Incorrect Privilege Assignment (vulnerable) (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-266-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"sync"
)

var memberships sync.Map

// Vulnerable: trusts client-supplied role when provisioning workspace access.
func InviteWorkspaceMember(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	if r.Method != http.MethodPost {
		http.Error(w, "method not allowed", http.StatusMethodNotAllowed)
		return
	}
	userID := r.FormValue("user_id")
	if userID == "" {
		http.Error(w, "missing user", http.StatusBadRequest)
		return
	}
	role := r.URL.Query().Get("role")
	memberships.Store(userID, role)
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusCreated)
}
